name: atout
description: Tu estudio freelance, organizado. Para developers web y community managers.
author: Giuliana Di Rocco

scripts.electron:build: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.mjs
scripts.electron:build:win: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.config.mjs
scripts.electron:build:mac: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.mjs
scripts.electron:build:linux: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=electron npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.config.mjs
scripts.mobile:build: cross-env BUILD_TARGET=mobile tsc -b && cross-env BUILD_TARGET=mobile vite build
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:sync:android: npm run mobile:build && npx cap sync android
scripts.mobile:sync:ios: npm run mobile:build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && npx cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync:ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:run:android: npm run mobile:sync:android && npx cap run android
scripts.mobile:run:ios: npm run mobile:sync:ios && npx cap run ios
